PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetCaseExpressionImpl(CASE_EXPRESSION)
    PsiElement(CASE)('case')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('plugin')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedCaseOptsBlockImpl(BRACED_CASE_OPTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetExpressionTrueImpl(EXPRESSION_TRUE)
            PsiElement(TRUE)('true')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"text"')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''text'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Something')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
            PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
            PsiElement(()('(')
            PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('END')
            PsiElement())(')')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  This is the text that gets assigned to $a.\n  And this too.\n')
      PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('  END')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
            PsiElement(REGEX)('/someregexp/')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetExpressionUnaryImpl(EXPRESSION_UNARY)
            PsiElement(!)('!')
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetExpressionParenImpl(EXPRESSION_PAREN)
            PsiElement(()('(')
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
            PsiElement())(')')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
            PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
            PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
            PsiElement({)('{')
            PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
              Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                PsiElement($)('$')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(=>)('=>')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
                PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('42')
            PsiElement(})('}')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetExpressionUnaryImpl(EXPRESSION_UNARY)
            PsiElement(-)('-')
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('myfunc')
            PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
              PsiElement(()('(')
              PsiElement())(')')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetExpressionFalseImpl(EXPRESSION_FALSE)
            PsiElement(FALSE)('false')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('    ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
